'''zaluthu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:leaderism|leaderism]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-l-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leaderism|leaderism]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zaluthu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zælithith|zælithith]] || [[word:zælithij|zælithij]] || [[word:zælithish|zælithish]] || [[word:zælithi|zælithi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zaluluthuth|zaluluthuth]] || [[word:zaluluthuj|zaluluthuj]] || [[word:zaluluthush|zaluluthush]] || [[word:zaluluthu|zaluluthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zaluthuth|zaluthuth]] || [[word:zaluthuj|zaluthuj]] || [[word:zaluthush|zaluthush]] || [[word:zaluthu|zaluthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zalufthuth|zalufthuth]] || [[word:zalufthuj|zalufthuj]] || [[word:zalufthush|zalufthush]] || [[word:zalufthuf|zalufthuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zaluthuthu|zaluthuthu]] || [[word:zaluthuju|zaluthuju]] || [[word:zaluthushu|zaluthushu]] || [[word:zaluthuku|zaluthuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zaluthuth|zaluthuth]] || [[word:zaluthuj|zaluthuj]] || [[word:zaluthush|zaluthush]] || [[word:zaluthu|zaluthu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zaluthuthul|zaluthuthul]] || [[word:zaluthujul|zaluthujul]] || [[word:zaluthushul|zaluthushul]] || [[word:zaluthukul|zaluthukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zaluthuthuthu|zaluthuthuthu]] || [[word:zaluthujuju|zaluthujuju]] || [[word:zaluthushushu|zaluthushushu]] || [[word:zaluthuku|zaluthuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zaluthuthun|zaluthuthun]] || [[word:zaluthujun|zaluthujun]] || [[word:zaluthushun|zaluthushun]] || [[word:zaluthukun|zaluthukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zaluthuthuoro|zaluthuthuoro]] || [[word:zaluthujuoro|zaluthujuoro]] || [[word:zaluthushuoro|zaluthushuoro]] || [[word:zaluthukuoro|zaluthukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
